prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已从低谷大幅回升、2026年物理类考生激增约43%加剧竞争、招生计划小幅缩招2.6%略有缓解等因素，竞争压力整体加大。在M 3供需弹性主值31682名基础上，考虑考生规模大幅增长的主导作用，预测2026年最低位次约32182名，区间31682–32682名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24956 → 31438 → 36406 → 40816 → 32190. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend (cumulative backward shift of about 15860 places), but in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 32190 (a forward shift of 8626 places compared to 2024), indicating that 2024 may have been an abnormal low point, with a clear recovery in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years has been large; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 82 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 75 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 76 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.6%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 54–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; in recent years, no significant negative or positive events have been observed in reputation monitoring, with average popularity on Douyin platform, no record of enrollment gaps, and overall stable application psychology; Geology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional ace disciplines (A+ in the fourth round of evaluation), and Geophysics, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc., also have strong strength, attracting some candidates in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 373,000 (estimated), a significant increase of about 43% compared to 261,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition, showing a steady upward trend; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is a cross-province application for Jiangsu candidates, with no significant regional preference advantage; local enrollment proportion data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has rebounded significantly from the low point, the sharp increase of about 43% in Physics Category candidates in 2026 intensifies competition, and the slight reduction of 2.6% in enrollment plan slightly alleviates it, the overall competitive pressure increases. Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity main value of 31682, and considering the dominant role of the substantial increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 32182, with a range of 31682–32682.
